name: Employer says it's not work-related - how to prove it is?

mainEntity.name: Employer says it's not work-related - how to prove it is?

acceptedAnswer.description: Use medical nexus letter, witness statements, job logs showing duties.[4] Key factors: (1) 'Arising out of' employment test; (2) Increased risk from job; (3) Timeline consistency; (4) Expert causation opinion. Preserve all evidence, avoid adjuster traps. Attorney builds strong case for hearing.
